scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @workout/shared build && concurrently -n shared,api,web -c magenta,cyan,green "pnpm --filter @workout/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @workout/api dev" "pnpm --filter @workout/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workout/shared build && pnpm --filter @workout/api build && pnpm --filter @workout/web build
